xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
## Translations for the livetables column titles ### Missing: extension.repository.emptyvalue= extension.repository.name=Nome extension.repository.summary=Resumo extension.repository.type=Tipo extension.repository.category=Categoria extension.repository.authors=Autores extension.repository.doc.creationDate=Criado em extension.repository.doc.date=Última modificação extension.repository.rating=Avaliação extension.repository.installedCount=Instalações
## Administration UI admin.repository=Repositório da extensão
## Support ### Missing: repository.support.createsupporter=
## Supporters ### Missing: repository.supporter.sheet.description= ### Missing: repository.supporter.sheet.noObject= ### Missing: repository.supporter.sheet.createplan= ### Missing: repository.supporter.sheet.plans= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_emptyvalue= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_doc.title= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_summary= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_url= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_email= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_content= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupporterClass_active=
## Support plans ### Missing: repository.supportplan.sheet.description= ### Missing: repository.supportplan.sheet.noObject= ### Missing: repository.supportplan.sheet.supportedExtensions= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_emptyvalue= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_doc.title= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_supporter= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_summary= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_url= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_content= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_active= ### Missing: ExtensionCode.ExtensionSupportPlanClass_paying=
